languages.text: "Разум... мой!" {n}Мужчина замирает, после чего начинает биться о палубу с удвоенной силой, что-то нечленораздельно вопя.{/n} "Те-е-ело — не мое! Те-те-тело... Кар-р-рцер!"
"The mind... is mine!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "The bodyyy is not! The b-b-body... A c-c-cell!"
languages.original_text: "Разум... мой!" {n}Мужчина замирает, после чего начинает биться о палубу с удвоенной силой, что-то нечленораздельно вопя.{/n} "Те-е-ело — не мое! Те-те-тело... Кар-р-рцер!"

traits.locale_text: "The mind... is mine!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "The bodyyy is not! The b-b-body... A c-c-cell!"
"The mind... is mine!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "The bodyyy is not! The b-b-body... A c-c-cell!"
"The mind... is mine! The bodyyy is not! The body... is the enemy! Destroy it! Do you want me to throw you in a c-c-cell?"
"The mind... is mine!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "The bodyyy is not! The b-b-body... A c-c-cell!"
"The mind... is mine!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "The bodyyy is not! The b-b-body... A c-c-cell!"

languages.text: 「心は俺のものだが、体は俺のものではない！不要なものを捨て、敵を倒せば、俺は自由になれる！」
languages.original_text: "The mind is mine, but the body is not! Shed the unwanted, take down the enemy, I will be free!"

traits.locale_text: 「心は俺のものだが、体は俺のものではない！不要なものを捨て、敵を倒せば、俺は自由になれる！」

languages.text: “思想……是我的！”{n}他先是僵住，随后开始加倍用力地拿头猛撞甲板，发出支离破碎的嘶喊：{/n}“但身体不是！身——身体……是牢房！”
languages.original_text: "The mind... is mine!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "The bodyyy is not! The b-b-body... A c-c-cell!"

traits.locale_text: “思想……是我的！”{n}他先是僵住，随后开始加倍用力地拿头猛撞甲板，发出支离破碎的嘶喊：{/n}“但身体不是！身——身体……是牢房！”

languages.text: « L'esprit... m'appartient ! » {n}Il se fige, puis commence à se frapper la tête contre le pont avec une force redoublée, hurlant des propos décousus :{/n} « Mais pas le cooorps ! Le c-corps... Une p-prison ! »
languages.original_text: "The mind... is mine!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "The bodyyy is not! The b-b-body... A c-c-cell!"

traits.locale_text: « L'esprit... m'appartient ! » {n}Il se fige, puis commence à se frapper la tête contre le pont avec une force redoublée, hurlant des propos décousus :{/n} « Mais pas le cooorps ! Le c-corps... Une p-prison ! »

languages.text: «La mente... es mía!». {n}Se detiene y empieza a dar cabezazos contra la cubierta con más fuerza que nunca, gritando frases inconexas:{/n} «¡El cuerpooo no! El cu... cuerpo... ¡Una celda!».
languages.original_text: "The mind... is mine!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "The bodyyy is not! The b-b-body... A c-c-cell!"

traits.locale_text: «La mente... es mía!». {n}Se detiene y empieza a dar cabezazos contra la cubierta con más fuerza que nunca, gritando frases inconexas:{/n} «¡El cuerpooo no! El cu... cuerpo... ¡Una celda!».

languages.text: "Zihin... Benim!" {n}Donup kalıyor, ardından iki kat güçle kafasını güverteye vurmaya başlıyor ve kesik kesik kelimelerle çığlık atıyor.{/n} "Bedeeen değil! Be... Beden... Bir hü... Hücre!"
languages.original_text: "The mind... is mine!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "The bodyyy is not! The b-b-body... A c-c-cell!"

traits.locale_text: "Zihin... Benim!" {n}Donup kalıyor, ardından iki kat güçle kafasını güverteye vurmaya başlıyor ve kesik kesik kelimelerle çığlık atıyor.{/n} "Bedeeen değil! Be... Beden... Bir hü... Hücre!"

languages.text: "Der Verstand ... gehört mir!" {n}Er erstarrt, ehe er seinen Kopf noch heftiger auf den Boden schlägt und brüllt:{/n} "Der Körpeeer ist nicht! Der K-k-körper ... Eine Z-z-zelle!"
languages.original_text: "The mind... is mine!" {n}He freezes, then begins smashing his head against the deck with redoubled force, screaming in broken words:{/n} "The bodyyy is not! The b-b-body... A c-c-cell!"
